obsidian.description: Obsidian REST API bridge (cyanheads) — frontmatter management, tag ops, global search. Requires Obsidian + Local REST API plugin.

obsidian-fs.description: Obsidian filesystem bridge (StevenStavrakis) — direct vault read/write. No Obsidian required.

nano-banana.description: AI image generation via Gemini 3.1 Flash Image (Nano Banana 2). Text-to-image, mask-free editing, style transfer via reference images, iterative editing. Free tier: 500 images/day.

stitch.description: Visual UI design generation (Google Stitch). Text-to-screen mockups, design system management, variant generation with creative range control (REFINE/EXPLORE/REIMAGINE).

playwright.description: Browser automation for visual QA. 4-breakpoint screenshots, CSS/DOM evaluation, accessibility auditing, console error detection, interaction testing.

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools MCP (official, by Chrome team). Exposes performance traces, network, console, DOM inspection, Lighthouse-style perf analysis on a live Chrome. Requires Node 20.19+. Complements Playwright for perf/tracing where Playwright snapshots fall short. Used by motion-health and perf-budgets skills.

next-devtools.description: Next.js DevTools MCP (official Vercel). Exposes Next.js build logs, deployment info, routing inspection. Separate from vercel-plugin MCP — focused on Next.js runtime introspection, not deploys.

3dsvg-export.description: Headless 3dsvg export server (Genorah v3.4.1). Renders preset → PNG (single, batch) and MP4 via Playwright + 3dsvg registerCanvas. Used by /gen:hero-mark export for the 30-variant brand matrix. Requires playwright (already declared) + optional @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg for MP4.
